articles.originalTitle: France coach to miss game after mother's death
articles.originalSummary: France coach Didier Deschamps will not be on the touchline for Les Bleus' final World Cup group game against Norway on Friday after the death of his mother.

articles.originalTitle: Ronaldo snaps goal drought, 1st to score at 6 WCs
articles.originalSummary: Cristiano Ronaldo made history Tuesday by becoming the first player to score in six different World Cups, finding the net in Portugal's 5-0 win over Uzbekistan.
